since_last: 43% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.45%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -1.56% · Gold -2.28% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 43% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.45%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.45%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.03%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -13.85%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +6.02%, HON +5.70%, GEV +4.77%, CBRS +4.72%, KLAC +4.17%. Laggards: TSLA -13.85%, GOOGL -6.87%, CRNC -5.96%, SYM -4.62%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.37% at $116.84
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
